description: A math utility server that safely evaluates mathematical expressions with built-in functions and constants.

tools.name: calculate
tools.description: Evaluate a mathematical expression and return the result with optional error feedback.

expression.description: The mathematical expression to evaluate, e.g. "2 + 3 * 4", "sqrt(16)", or "sin(pi / 4)".
The original mathematical expression that was evaluated.

result.description: The numerical result of the evaluated expression. Present only when evaluation succeeds.

error.description: A descriptive error message if the expression is invalid or evaluation fails. Absent when evaluation succeeds.
